title: Simulation validation gate before hardware smoke tests
description:
Gate: complete simulation coverage before hardware smoke tests.

Purpose: Ensure firmware logic is validated in simulation before burning time on hardware debugging. Hardware tests should only find physical issues (RF tuning, electrical timing, flash layout), not logic bugs.

Required before hardware (ev5b.5, h7t5.7.10, etc):
- [ ] RX path simulation working (r7h4.7 chain complete)
- [ ] Meshtastic native_sim harness passing (t2hn.10)
- [ ] Flash/NVS persistence simulation (y2ec)
- [ ] 2-node TX/RX integration test in Renode (pfqv)

NOT required (these are hardware-only by design):
- GNSS electrical validation (63mu)
- Reset pin timing (ev5b.9)
- Bootloader/UF2 layout (ev5b.10)
- RF tuning, antenna matching

Acceptance: simulation tests pass; hardware tests can focus on physical validation.
